title: Mbulavurisano hi ku Hundza ka Nkarhi
subject: History

meta.title: Mbulavurisano hi ku Hundza ka Nkarhi
meta.subject: History

sources.title: The oldest forms of human communication

slides.heading: Mbulavurisano hi ku Hundza ka Nkarhi
slides.lead: Ku suka eka mangoma ni marimba (smoke signals) ya khale, ku ya eka mapapila, riqingho, radio ni internet ya namuntlha.

image.alt: Ngoma, papila, riqingho ra khale ni selfoni swi le nchumeni wun'we, swi kombisa ndlela leyi mbulavurisano wu cinceke ha yona hi ku famba ka nkarhi.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 160' role='img'><rect width='320' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M28 96 q26 -18 52 0 v20 q-26 16 -52 0 Z' fill='#8a4b2a'/><ellipse cx='54' cy='96' rx='26' ry='9' fill='#c8853a'/><rect x='108' y='84' width='52' height='38' fill='#fff' stroke='#333' stroke-width='2'/><path d='M108 84 L134 104 L160 84' fill='none' stroke='#333' stroke-width='2'/><rect x='188' y='80' width='40' height='44' rx='6' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='196' y='70' width='24' height='14' rx='7' fill='#2f5233'/><circle cx='208' cy='108' r='6' fill='#dcd3c2'/><rect x='260' y='72' width='30' height='54' rx='5' fill='#333'/><rect x='264' y='80' width='22' height='34' fill='#8fd0e8'/><circle cx='275' cy='120' r='3' fill='#dcd3c2'/></svg>

slides.notes: Amukela ntlawa. Vutisa swichudeni leswaku a va ta byela munghana wa le kule mahungu lamanene tanihi namuntlha (ku fonela, ku rhumela rungula, video). Hlamusela leswaku mbulavurisano wu vula ku avelana vuxokoxoko, na leswaku vanhu va tshamela ku swi lava - kambe switirhisiwa swi cincile ngopfu. Namuntlha hi famba ku suka eka tindlela ta khalekhale ta mbulavurisano ku ya fika eka internet.

slides.heading: Xana mbulavurisano i yini?
slides.lead: Mbulavurisano i ndlela leyi hi avelanaka vuxokoxoko na van'wana ha yona.

blocks.text: Siku ni siku hi **avelana vuxokoxoko** na van'wana. Ha vulavula, ha yingisela, ha tsala na ku hlaya. Hi tirhisa na swifaniso, tikombiso ni mipfumawulo. Leswi hinkwaswo i tindlela to burisana.

items: Hi burisana ku kombela mpfuno ni ku hlayisa un'wana un'wana a hlayisekile.
Hi burisana ku avelana mahungu, mintsheketo ni mintlhaveko.
Hi burisana ku dyondza eka van'wana ni ku va dyondzisa.

slides.notes: Hlayisa leswi swi ri erivaleni. Nyika swikombiso swo olova: manana la vitanaka n'wana ku ta dya, mudyondzisi la tsalaka ebodweni, munghana la tsakisaka hi voko. Kombisa leswaku mbulavurisano wu lava munhu la rhumelaka rungula ni un'wana la wu amukelaka. Vutisa swichudeni ku boxa tindlela tinharhu leti va burisaneke ha tona va nga si ta exikolweni namuntlha.

slides.heading: Ku vulavula ni ku hlaya mintsheketo
slides.lead: Khale, ku nga si va na ku tsala, vanhu a va avelana hinkwaswo hi ku vulavula.

blocks.text: Ndlela ya khalekhale yo burisana i hi ku **vulavula ni ku yingisela**. Vakulukumba a va hlayela vana mintsheketo ku va dyondzisa hi ndyangu wa vona, matimu ya vona ni ndlela yo hanya kahle. Leswi swi vuriwa **ndhavuko wo hlayela hi nomu** - ku hundzisela vutivi hi ku vulavula.

items: Mintsheketo, tinsimu ni switlangi swo dzunisa a swi tsundzukiwa ni ku hlayeleriwa nkarhi ni nkarhi.
Vanhu va Vasan ni Vakhoi va Afrika-Dzonga a va hundzisela matimu ya vona hi ndlela leyi.
Vutivi byin'wana a byi tsariwanga, kambe a byi lahlekanga - a byi tsundzukiwa ni ku averiwa.

image.alt: Vanhu va tshamile va rhendzele ndzilo loko un'wana a ri karhi a hlaya ntsheketo.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M96 118 q14 -30 28 0 Z' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M104 118 q6 -18 12 0 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><g fill='#2f5233'><circle cx='50' cy='70' r='11'/><rect x='43' y='82' width='14' height='30' rx='4'/><circle cx='170' cy='70' r='11'/><rect x='163' y='82' width='14' height='30' rx='4'/><circle cx='40' cy='108' r='10'/><circle cx='180' cy='108' r='10'/></g><rect x='20' y='126' width='180' height='6' fill='#c8b89a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Kandziyisa leswaku ndhavuko wo hlayela hi nomu i ndlela ya ntiyiso naswona yo tshembheka yo hlayisa matimu, ku nga ri ndlela yo tsongahala. Boxa mhaka ya SAHO ya leswaku vafambi vo sungula va le Yuropa a va anakanya hi xihoxo leswaku loko ku nga ri na tibuku, a ku nga na matimu - kambe matimu ya Afrika a ma hlayisiwile kahle hi mintsheketo, mimianakanyo ni mindhavuko leyi averiwaka hi vakulukumba. Vutisa swichudeni leswaku i mintsheketo yihi leyi mindyangu ya vona yi yi hlayaka.

slides.heading: Mangoma, musi ni marimba (signals)
slides.lead: U rhumela njhani rungula eka vanhu lava nga ekule swinene lero va nga wu twiki rito ra wena?

blocks.text: Khale, vanhu va kume tindlela to tlhariha to rhumela marungula eku heleleni ka tindhawu to leha. **Mangoma** a ma biwa hi tindlela to hlawuleka, naswona xitshukelo xin'wana ni xin'wana a xi byela vaakelani hi mahungu kumbe khombo. **Marimba ya musi** ni mindzilo a swi ta voniwa ekule swinene ivi swi tsundzuxa vanhu hi swilo leswi a va fanele ku swi tiva.

items: Switshukelo swa ngoma a swi ta tsundzuxa muti leswaku ku ta vaenzi kumbe khombo.
Musi hi nhlekanhi ni ndzilo nivusiku a swi voniwa ku tsemakanya tindhawu to leha.
Varhumiwa na vona a va tsutsuma kumbe va gada ku rhwala marito ya nkoka ku ma yisa ndhawu yin'wana.

image.alt: Xitsunga xa ntshava ni ndzilo lowu tlakuselaka marimba ya musi ematilweni.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M0 130 L70 96 L120 118 L180 92 L220 116 L220 130 Z' fill='#7a8b5a'/><path d='M96 120 q14 -22 26 0 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><path d='M100 120 q9 -12 18 0 Z' fill='#e8a13a'/><g fill='#b7a98d'><circle cx='109' cy='86' r='9'/><circle cx='118' cy='68' r='11'/><circle cx='104' cy='52' r='13'/><circle cx='120' cy='36' r='15'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Endla leswi swi ve na vutomi naswona swi hlanganyela - u nga ba xikhindlha xo olova ivi u vutisa ntlawa loko va nga swi kota ku 'hlaya' xitshukelo lexi phindha-phindhiwaka. Hlamusela leswaku marimba lawa a ma tirha hikuva un'wana ni un'wana emugangeni a a pfumelelana leswaku xitshukelo kumbe xikombiso xin'wana ni xin'wana xi vula yini. Sweswo swa ha ri ntiyiso na namuntlha: mbulavurisano wu tirha ntsena loko hi avelana khodi (code), tanihi ririmi.

slides.heading: Swifaniso eka maribye
slides.lead: Marungula man'wana ya khalekhale eAfrika-Dzonga a ma pendiwa eka ribye.

blocks.text: Vanhu va Vasan a va penda ni ku vatla swifaniso eka maribye ni emakhwatini. Leswi swi vuriwa **swifaniso swa le maribyeni (rock art)**, swi kombisa swiharhi, ku hlota ni swiendlakalo swa nkoka. Swifaniso a swi avelana miehleketo ni mintsheketo, naswona swo tala swa swona swa ha voniwa na namuntlha, endzhaku ka magidi ya malembe.

items: Swifaniso swa le maribyeni i yin'wana ya tindlela ta khalekhale to rhekhoda mbulavurisano.
Swifaniso swi hi byela hi swiharhi, ripfumelo ni vutomi bya vapendi.
Hikuva a swi pendiwe eka ribye, rungula ri tshamile nkarhi wo leha swinene.

image.alt: Rirhangu ra ribye ri ni swifaniso leswi pendiweke swa vanhu lava hlotaka mhala.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M0 0 h220 v160 h-220 Z' fill='#c8b89a'/><g fill='#8a3b1f'><path d='M140 70 q18 -10 34 0 l-4 14 h-8 v18 h-6 v-16 h-8 v16 h-6 v-18 h-4 Z'/><circle cx='157' cy='60' r='6'/><path d='M138 96 l-6 10 M176 96 l6 10' stroke='#8a3b1f' stroke-width='3'/></g><g fill='#5c1414'><circle cx='58' cy='72' r='5'/><rect x='55' y='78' width='6' height='20'/><path d='M55 84 l-12 6 M61 84 l12 -6' stroke='#5c1414' stroke-width='3'/><path d='M55 98 l-8 14 M61 98 l8 14' stroke='#5c1414' stroke-width='3'/></g><circle cx='92' cy='70' r='5' fill='#5c1414'/><rect x='89' y='76' width='6' height='20' fill='#5c1414'/></svg>

slides.notes: Hlanganisa swifaniso swa le maribyeni ni miehleketo yo rhekhoda rungula leswaku ri tshama nkarhi wo leha. Ku hambana ni rito leri vulavuriwaka leri hundzaka, xifaniso eka ribye xa tshama. Leri i goza ro sungula ku ya eka ku tsala. Loko ndhawu ya n'wina yi ri ni tindhawu leti tiviwaka ta swifaniso swa le maribyeni, ti boxe. Kombisa xichavo: leti i tindhawu ta nkoka ta ndzhaka leti faneleke ku sirheleriwa.

slides.heading: Ku swi tsala hansi
slides.lead: Vanhu va dyondze ku hundzula mipfumawulo ni miehleketo swi va tikombiso leti hi ti vitanaka ku tsala.

blocks.text: Magidi ya malembe lama hundzeke, vanhu vo tanihi **Vaegipta (Egyptians)** va sungula ku tirhisa swifaniswa ku yimela swilo ni mipfumawulo. Hi ku famba ka nkarhi wo leha, swifaniswa leswi swi hundzuke **maalfabeta (alphabets)** - swiphemu switsongo swa maletere lawa hi ma hlanganisaka ku endla marito. Ku tsala ku endle leswaku vanhu va hlayisa tirhekhodo ni ku rhumela marungula lama kongomeke.

items: Ku tsala swi vula leswaku rungula ri nga hlayisiwa ni ku hlayiwa nakambe endzhaku.
Alfabeta yi tirhisa maletere ma nga ri mangani ntsena ku tsala rito rin'wana ni rin'wana.
Vanhu a va tsala eka vumba, ribye, madzovo ya swiharhi kutani endzhaku eka phepha.

image.alt: Xikhovha xa phepha xi ni maletere ya alfabeta ni penisi ya ntsiva.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='50' y='34' width='96' height='96' rx='6' fill='#efe6d2' stroke='#b7a98d' stroke-width='3'/><rect x='64' y='52' width='68' height='6' fill='#8a5a3a'/><rect x='64' y='68' width='68' height='6' fill='#8a5a3a'/><rect x='64' y='84' width='52' height='6' fill='#8a5a3a'/><rect x='64' y='100' width='60' height='6' fill='#8a5a3a'/><path d='M150 40 L184 74 L176 82 L142 48 Z' fill='#2f5233'/><path d='M142 48 L150 40 L156 46 L148 54 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/></svg>

slides.notes: Hlayisa swi ri swo olova: ku tsala i ndlela yo dirowa marito ya hina leswaku ma tshama ni ku famba. Hlanganisa ni tislayidi to sungula - ntsheketo wu nga rivalwa kumbe wu cinca eka ku hlayela kun'wana ni kun'wana, kambe ku tsala ku hlayisa marito lama fanaka. U nga kombisa ntlawa ndlela leyi vito ra vona ri nga nchumu wa maletere ya alfabeta ha yona. Slayidi leyi yi hlanganisa misava ya khale ni switirhisiwa swa manguva lawa leswi landzelaka.

slides.heading: Ku hatimisa tibuku ni maphephahungu
slides.lead: Nkarhi wo leha buku yin'wana ni yin'wana a yi fanele ku kopiwa hi mavoko, yin'we hi yin'we.

blocks.text: Kwalomu ka malembe ya 600 lama hundzeke, ku vumbiwe muchini lowu vitaniwaka **muchini wo hatimisa (printing press)**. A wu hatimisa pheji rin'we ka minkarhi yo tala, hi ku hatlisa. Sweswi tibuku ni **maphephahungu** a swi endliwa hi ntsengo lowukulu, lero vanhu vo tala swinene a va kota ku hlaya rungula ro fana.

items: Ku nga si va na ku hatimisa, tibuku a ti ri nkolo naswona ti durha swinene.
Ku hatimisa ku endle leswaku tibuku ti chipa, lero vanhu vo tala va dyondza ku hlaya.
Maphephahungu ma endle leswaku vanhu vo tala va avelana mahungu ma fanaka hi nkarhi wun'we.

image.alt: Nchumu wa tibuku leti hatimisiweke ekusuhi ni phephahungu ro songhiwa.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='36' y='96' width='70' height='16' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='40' y='80' width='70' height='16' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='36' y='64' width='70' height='16' fill='#e8a13a'/><rect x='40' y='48' width='70' height='16' fill='#3f6b45'/><rect x='128' y='52' width='60' height='72' fill='#fff' stroke='#333' stroke-width='2'/><rect x='136' y='60' width='44' height='8' fill='#333'/><rect x='136' y='74' width='20' height='30' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='160' y='74' width='20' height='6' fill='#999'/><rect x='160' y='84' width='20' height='6' fill='#999'/><rect x='160' y='94' width='20' height='6' fill='#999'/></svg>

slides.notes: Kandziyisa ku cinca lokukulu: ku hatimisa ku endle leswaku rungula ri hangalaka eka vanhu vo tala hi nkarhi wun'we, ku nga ri ntsena eka lava nga ni tibuku leti kopiweke hi mavoko. Vutisa swichudeni leswaku va ha vona kwihi marito lama hatimisiweke namuntlha (tibuku, maphephahungu, tibokisi ta swakudya, tiposta). Boxa leswaku leswi swi endle leswaku ku dyondza ni mahungu swi kumeka eka vanhu vo tala ngopfu.

slides.heading: Positi: mapapila eku suhi ni ekule
slides.lead: U rhumela njhani marito ya wena eka un'wana la nga edorobeni rin'wana?

blocks.text: Vanhu a va tsala **mapapila** ivi va ma rhumela hi **sisiteme ya positi**. Mapapila a ma rhwaleriwa hi vanhu hi milenge, hi hava, hi xikepe kutani endzhaku hi xitimela ni xihaha-mpfhuka. Papila a ri rhwala marito ya wena lama kongomeke ku ya eka maxaka ni vanghana lava nga ekule.

items: U veka papila enveloponi ivi u engetela xitembhu ni adirese.
Hofisi ya positi yi hlengeleta mapapila ivi yi ma rhumela ndhawu leyi faneleke.
Papila a ri nga teka masiku kumbe mavhiki ku fika ekule.

image.alt: Envelope ri ni xitembhu ri ri karhi ri veriwa ebokisini ra positi.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='120' y='56' width='56' height='84' rx='8' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='128' y='66' width='40' height='8' rx='2' fill='#2b0d0d'/><rect x='106' y='40' width='40' height='28' fill='#fff' stroke='#333' stroke-width='2' transform='rotate(-14 126 54)'/><rect x='128' y='34' width='12' height='12' fill='#e8a13a' transform='rotate(-14 134 40)'/><path d='M106 46 L126 60 L146 46' fill='none' stroke='#333' stroke-width='2' transform='rotate(-14 126 54)'/></svg>

slides.notes: Endla leswaku sisiteme ya positi yi twala yi ri ya ntiyiso - swichudeni swo tala swa ha amukela swiphakelo. Kombisa adirese ni xitembhu tanihi 'khodi' leyi yisaka papila ekaya lero ri faneleke. Hlanganisa nkarhi wo yimela (masiku kumbe mavhiki) ni marungula ya namuntlha lama fikaka hi ku hatlisa, leswi nga hlanganisaka kahle ni tislayidi leti landzelaka.

slides.heading: Telegrafu (telegraph) ni riqingho
slides.lead: Michini leyintshwa yi endle leswaku marungula ma famba kwalomu ku fana ni rihati, ma landza tintambhu.

blocks.text: **Telegrafu (telegraph)** a yi rhumela marungula tanihi swikombiso swo koma ni swo leha swi landza tintambhu, yi tirhisa khodi yo hlawuleka. Kutani **riqingho**, leri vumbiweke hi 1876, ri endle leswaku vanhu va twana marito ya vona ku tsemakanya tindhawu to leha. Ro sungula, a wu kota ku vulavula ni un'wana la nga ekule, hi nkarhi wolowo.

items: Telegrafu a yi rhumela marungula hi khodi ya matontlho ni tindzeriso.
Riqingho ri endle leswaku vanhu va vulavula ni ku yingisela hi nkarhi wolowo hakunene.
Michini leyi yi endle leswaku mbulavurisano wu hatlisa ngopfu ku tlula papila.

image.alt: Riqingho ra khale ri ni xikhomiwa ehenhla ni dayela emahlweni.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 160' role='img'><rect width='200' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='60' y='78' width='80' height='56' rx='8' fill='#2f5233'/><circle cx='100' cy='108' r='16' fill='#dcd3c2'/><circle cx='100' cy='108' r='7' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='58' y='60' width='84' height='16' rx='8' fill='#1f3a24'/><path d='M58 68 q-14 -2 -14 12 M142 68 q14 -2 14 12' stroke='#1f3a24' stroke-width='6' fill='none' stroke-linecap='round'/><path d='M140 120 q30 6 34 30' fill='none' stroke='#333' stroke-width='3'/></svg>

slides.notes: Nkarhi wa Grade 4: kongomisa eka miehleketo leyikulu ya leswaku marito sweswi a ma kota ku famba ekule ma landza tintambhu. U nga boxa Alexander Graham Bell tanihi munhu la hlanganisiwaka ni riqingho hi 1876. [SME] Kamberisa siku leri riqingho ni telegrafu swi ngheneke hi rona eAfrika-Dzonga loko ku lavaka siku ra le kaya. Vutisa swichudeni ku anakanya ku twa rito ra kokwana ro sungula ku suka ekule.

slides.eyebrow: Mpfumawulo ni swifaniso hi le moyeni
slides.heading: Radio ni thelevhixini (television)
slides.lead: Sweswi marungula a ma kota ku fika eka magidi ya vanhu hi nkarhi wun'we, handle ka tintambhu.

blocks.text: **Radio** yi rhumela mpfumawulo hi le moyeni, lero vanhu vo tala va yingisela mahungu, vuyimbeleri ni mintsheketo yo fana hi nkarhi wun'we. Endzhaku, **thelevhixini (television)** yi engetele swifaniso leswi fambaka eka mpfumawulo. EAfrika-Dzonga, ku sakariwa ka radio ku sungurile hi va-1930, kutani thelevhixini yi sungurile hi 1976.

items: Radio yi tise mahungu, vuyimbeleri ni mintlangu emakaya ya vanhu.
Thelevhixini yi engetele swifaniso, lero hi kota ku vona swiendlakalo ni ku swi twa.
Ku sakariwa kun'we a ku fika eka vanhu vo tala etikweni hinkwaro hi nkarhi wun'we.

image.alt: Radio ra khale ri ni tidayela ni thelevhixini leyi kombisaka magandlati lama humaka eka antena.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='24' y='70' width='72' height='60' rx='6' fill='#8a5a3a'/><circle cx='44' cy='100' r='12' fill='#dcd3c2'/><rect x='62' y='84' width='26' height='6' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='62' y='96' width='26' height='6' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='62' y='108' width='26' height='6' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='120' y='74' width='76' height='56' rx='6' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='128' y='82' width='60' height='40' fill='#8fd0e8'/><path d='M158 74 L150 50 M158 74 L172 52' stroke='#333' stroke-width='3'/><path d='M150 44 q6 4 8 0 M144 40 q12 8 20 0' fill='none' stroke='#e8a13a' stroke-width='3'/></svg>

slides.notes: Kandziyisa ku tlula ka sakariwa (broadcasting): rungula rin'we ri fika eka magidi hi nkarhi wun'we. [SME] Kamberisa masiku ya sakariwa ya Afrika-Dzonga - sakariwa ra radio eAfrika-Dzonga hi ntolovelo ri nyikiwa va-1920 na va-1930 (SABC yi vumbiwe hi 1936) naswona thelevhixini ya rixaka yi sungurile hi 1976; tiyisisa ndlela yo swi hlamusela u nga si hatimisa. Vutisa swichudeni leswaku i xihi lexi va xi tirhisaka ngopfu namuntlha, radio kumbe thelevhixini, ni hikwalaho ka yini.

slides.heading: Tikhompiyuta, internet ni tiselfoni
slides.lead: Namuntlha hi kota ku rhumela marito, swifaniso ni marito ku rhendzela misava hi tisekoni ntsena.

blocks.text: **Tikhompiyuta** ni **internet** swi hlanganisa vanhu emisaveni hinkwayo. Hi rhumela ti-imeyili ni marungula, hi avelana tifoto ni ku fonela hi video maxaka lama nga matikweni man'wana. **Tiselfoni** ti endla leswaku hi swi kota leswi hinkwaswo hi swikhwameni swa hina, kwalomu ni kwihi laha hi yaka kona.

items: Internet yi endla leswaku hi rhumela rungula ku tsemakanya misava hi tisekoni.
Selfoni yi kota ku fonela, ku rhumela rungula, ku teka tifoto ni ku nghena eka internet.
Sweswi hi kota ku vona ni ku twa vanhu va le kule hi nkarhi wolowo hakunene.

image.alt: Khompiyuta ya laptop ni selfoni swi ni bulu ra marito leri kombisaka leswaku swi hlanganisiwile.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='30' y='56' width='84' height='54' rx='4' fill='#333'/><rect x='36' y='62' width='72' height='42' fill='#8fd0e8'/><path d='M24 110 h96 l8 12 h-112 Z' fill='#666'/><rect x='168' y='50' width='40' height='68' rx='6' fill='#333'/><rect x='172' y='58' width='32' height='48' fill='#8fd0e8'/><circle cx='188' cy='112' r='3' fill='#dcd3c2'/><path d='M120 60 q28 -18 44 6' fill='none' stroke='#2f5233' stroke-width='3' stroke-dasharray='5 5'/><circle cx='142' cy='48' r='4' fill='#e8a13a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Yisa mhaka eka vutomi bya swichudeni - vo tala va ta tiva tiselfoni ni internet kahle. Boxa leswaku internet yi sungurile ku tirhisiwa hi vanhu vo tala hi va-1990 naswona tiselfoni ti hundzuke to tolovelekile eAfrika-Dzonga hi va-1990 na yona. [SME] Tiyisisa ndlela yo hlamusela ku sungula ka tiselfoni eAfrika-Dzonga (tinethiweke ta mobayili ti sungurile hi 1994) loko ku tirhisiwa siku. Vutisa: xana selfoni yi endla yini leyi papila ri nga swi kotiki, naswona xana papila ra ha endla yini kahle?

slides.heading: Mbulavurisano hi ku hundza ka nkarhi

blocks.alt: Nkarhilayini wa mbulavurisano ku suka eka ku hlaya mintsheketo hi nomu ni swifaniso swa le maribyeni, ku hundza eka ku tsala, ku hatimisa, positi, riqingho, radio, thelevhixini ni internet.

events.label: Ku vulavula, ku hlaya mintsheketo, mangoma ni marimba ya musi
Swifaniso swa le maribyeni leswi pendiweke hi vanhu va Vasan
Ku tsala ni maalfabeta swa sungula
Muchini wo hatimisa wu endla tibuku to tala
Riqingho ri endla leswaku marito ma famba ekule
Sakariwa ra radio ri fika emakaya ya Afrika-Dzonga
Internet ni tiselfoni swi hangalaka ngopfu

slides.notes: Tirhisa slayidi leyi ku vuyelela riendzo hinkwaro hi ndlandlamuko. Kombisa xikombiso: eku sunguleni marungula a ma famba hi ku nonoka naswona ma fika eka vanhu va nga ri vangani, kutani hi ku famba ka nkarhi ma hatlisa naswona ma fika eka vanhu vo tala. [SME] Masiku ya radio ya va-1930 ni muchini wo hatimisa wa 1440 i masiku yo dyondzisa lama ya kwalomu - tiyisisa u nga si hatimisa. Vutisa swichudeni leswaku hi kuvumba kwihi loku va anakanyaka leswaku ku cincile vutomi bya vanhu ngopfu.

slides.heading: Xihi lexi cinceke, na xihi lexi tshameke ku fana
slides.lead: Switirhisiwa swi cincile ngopfu, kambe xivangelo lexi hi burisanaka ha xona xi tshamile xi fana.

blocks.heading: Swa ha fana
blocks.text: Ha ha burisana ku avelana mahungu, ku kombela mpfuno, ni ku tshama ekusuhi ni vanhu lava hi va rhandzaka.

blocks.heading: Ku hatlisa ngopfu
blocks.text: Rungula leri a ri teka mavhiki hi papila sweswi ri teka tisekoni ntsena eka internet.

blocks.heading: Ri fika eka vanhu vo tala
blocks.text: Ngoma a yi fika eka muti wun'we; internet yi kota ku fika emisaveni hinkwayo.

slides.notes: Humesa miehleketo ya CAPS ya ku cinca ni ku ya emahlweni. Xihi lexi cinceke: rivilo, mpfhuka ni ntsengo wa vanhu lava hi va fikaka. Xihi lexi tshameke xi fana: xilaveko xa vanhu xo avelana vuxokoxoko ni ku tshama va hlanganile. Leswi swi pfuna swichudeni ku vona matimu tanihi ku cinca ni swilo leswi yaka emahlweni. Rhamba swikombiso ku suka eka mindyangu ya vona.

slides.heading: A hi kambeleni leswi hi swi dyondzeke
slides.lead: Mbulavurisano wu kurile ku suka eka mintsheketo leyi hlayeriwaka ni mangoma ku ya fika eka internet - kambe xikongomelo xa wona xi tshama xi fana.

blocks.text: Hi fambile ku suka eka **ku vulavula, mangoma ni marimba ya musi**, ku ya eka **swifaniso swa le maribyeni ni ku tsala**, ku ya eka **ku hatimisa, positi, riqingho, radio, thelevhixini** kutani eku heteleleni **internet ni tiselfoni**. Xitirhisiwa xin'wana ni xin'wana lexintshwa xi endle leswaku marungula ma famba hi ku hatlisa naswona ma fika eka vanhu vo tala.

blocks.question: Boxa tindlela timbirhi leti vanhu a va burisana ha tona khale, va nga si tsala.
Hlamusela ndlela leyi riqingho ri cinceke ndlela leyi vanhu a va burisana ha yona.
Hlawula xitirhisiwa xin'we xa manguva lawa (radio, thelevhixini, internet kumbe selfoni) ivi u vula leswaku ha yini xi ri xa nkoka.

slides.notes: Tirhisa swivutiso swinharhu tanihi vuyelelo byo vulavuriwa kumbe byo tsariwa. Tinhlamulo leti ringanyetiwaka: (1) tin'wana timbirhi ta ku vulavula/ku hlaya mintsheketo, mangoma, marimba ya musi, varhumiwa, swifaniso swa le maribyeni; (2) ri endle leswaku vanhu va twana marito ya vona ku tsemakanya tindhawu to leha, hi nkarhi wolowo, ku nga ri ku yimela papila; (3) amukela xivangelo xin'wana ni xin'wana lexi twisisekaka - ri fika eka vanhu vo tala, ri hatlisa, ri tisa mahungu naswona ri hi pfumelela ku tshama hi hlanganile. Gimeta hi ku vutisa swichudeni ku anakanya leswaku mbulavurisano wu ta languteka njhani loko va kurile.
